branding.label: Branding
branding.description: Customize the product name, logo, and theme colors users see across the app.

modules.label: Modules
modules.description: Turn app modules on or off. Disabled modules are hidden from the navigation.

data.label: Data
data.description: Understand entity architecture, database schema relationships, datasets, and import readiness.

intelligence.label: Intelligence
intelligence.description: Control the AI layer — the assistant, side panel, and activity feed.

language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the language used across the workspace. Switching is instant — no reload required.

roles.label: Roles & access
roles.description: Role-based permissions will live here. Coming soon.

demo.label: Demo environment
demo.description: Save, review, and activate demo environment snapshots.

saveDialog.title: Save demo environment
saveDialog.description: Capture the current platform settings as a reusable demo environment snapshot.
saveDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: What this environment is configured to show...
saveDialog.localOnlyNote: Saves to this browser only. To share with everyone after deploy, use Export for deploy on a built-in environment (Equisoft or SBLI).

demo.intro: Saved demo environments capture branding, module toggles, case type settings, AI visibility, language, and appearance from the moment you save.
demo.emptyDescription: Use Save in the lower-left settings footer to capture the current setup.
demo.sharedDatasetNote: Equisoft and SBLI use the US demo cases dataset; Guardian 1821 uses the UK Guardian dataset (GBP). Toggle active to switch environment.
demo.exportDeployDone: Downloaded {{filename}}. Replace {{path}} in the repo, commit, and deploy so everyone sees this configuration.

errors.fileType: Only PNG, SVG, JPEG, or WEBP files are supported.
errors.fileSize: Logo must be 500 KB or smaller.

modules.intro: Toggle modules on or off to control what appears in the navigation. At least one module must remain enabled.
modules.lastEnabledTitle: At least one module must be enabled

home.label: Home
home.description: Dashboard with key metrics, workload summary, and quick-access widgets.

cases.label: Cases
cases.description: Full case management workspace — browse, filter, and work cases end-to-end.

folders.label: Folders
folders.description: Multi-case folder view that groups related sub-cases under a single applicant.

finances.label: Finances
finances.description: Financial operations, billing signals, and payment workflows. Coming soon.

users.label: Team
users.description: Team roster, workload, training, availability, and work reassignment for managers.

tasks.label: Tasks
tasks.description: Unified task list across all cases with priority, due dates, and status.

requests.label: Requests
requests.description: Centralized intake and service requests across cases, clients, policies, and documents.

documents.label: Documents
documents.description: Document repository for uploading, reviewing, and validating case documents.

aiActions.label: Intelligence monitoring
aiActions.description: Global audit and control feed for AI/system actions across cases, tasks, documents, and requests.

insights.label: Insights
insights.description: Operational insights and intelligence views. Coming soon.

reports.label: Reports
reports.description: Reporting dashboards and exports. Coming soon.

copilot.label: AI Assistant
copilot.description: Amplify Copilot — an AI assistant that helps manage workload and draft communications.

config.modeDescription: Single shows one case type everywhere. Multi lets users work across several types.

data.intro: Understand the entity architecture behind the platform, control which entities and business lines are active, and prepare demo data for future imports or database-backed sources.

currency.label: Display currency
currency.hint: Applies to this data context when it is active in the workspace.

objects.title: Entities
objects.description: Toggle the entity types that are active in this demo environment. Counts come from the active dataset.

workflows.title: Business lines
workflows.description: Enable or disable the business lines supported by this environment. These drive which case types appear in Cases.

schema.title: Database schema explorer
schema.description: Expand each entity to inspect table names, keys, fields, and inbound or outbound relationships.

dataset.title: Dataset preview
dataset.description: Validate that the active mock data is a connected entity graph rather than isolated rows.

import.title: Import data
import.description: Import is staged as an architecture-ready flow. This phase shows mapping and validation without mutating data.
import.dropDescription: Future imports will map case-by-case or environment packages to entity schemas, validate relationships, and preview errors before data is accepted.

intelligence.intro: Configure which parts of the AI layer are visible to users across the workspace.

assistant.label: AI Assistant module
assistant.description: Show the Assistant entry in the navigation rail. Disabling also hides the full-page Copilot.

sidePanel.label: AI side panel
sidePanel.description: Show the chat bubble in the header that opens the AI panel alongside any screen.

caseAssistant.label: Case AI assistant
caseAssistant.description: Show the contextual Assistant banner and side panel on case detail pages.

activityFeed.label: AI activity feed
activityFeed.description: Show the feed widget in the navigation rail. When shown, it activates automatically.

language.intro: Choose the language used across the workspace. Switching is instant — no reload required.

en.sample: Welcome back — pick up where you left off.

fr.sample: Bon retour — reprenez là où vous étiez.

es.sample: Bienvenido de nuevo — continúe donde lo dejó.

roles.intro: Assessor and Manager roles with distinct permissions and access levels. Settings are previewed here so you know where they will live.

assessor.name: Assessor
assessor.description: Reviews cases, records decisions within authority, and assigns requirements.

manager.name: Manager
manager.description: Oversees the team, reassigns workload, approves escalations, and manages case types.
